description: Reference equations used by plan-lib.js. This file documents the math for the AI prompt; the app implements the same formulas in code so results are exact, not model-approximated.
wingArea: S = ((rootChordMM + tipChordMM) / 2) * wingspanMM   [mm^2, divide by 10000 for dm^2]
wingLoading: WL = weightG / (S / 10000)   [g/dm^2] — weightG is DERIVED as S(dm^2) * targetWingLoading, not chosen freely
cgPosition: cgFromRootLE_MM = macLE + MAC * (cgPercentMAC / 100), where macLE is the sweep offset at the spanwise MAC station
note: Weight is never an input the model or the pilot chooses directly — it is computed from wing area and the style's target wing loading so wing loading is always correct by construction.
